A Starlit Darkness Manga Approaches Relationships Very Differently From Cherry Magic
A Starlit Darkness is the new manga from the Cherry Magic creator, and it depicts a very different relationship dynamic.

The Anime Heroes One Piece Gear 5 Luffy action figure is slightly bendy and much less posable than the SH Figuarts release.

Bride of the Death God 3 Complicates Things With Reincarnation
Constant lore additions and shinigami are a lot in Bride of the Death God, and the past lives element makes it even more complex.
